description_long: This is a vintage corded telephone featuring a rotary dial on a rectangular base, adorned with ornate brass and black metal accents. The handset is connected to the base by a coiled cord and rests on a decorative cradle with gold-toned supports. The earpiece and mouthpiece are both cylindrical and finished in black, contrasting with the metallic gold and brown hues of the main body. The rotary dial is prominently placed at the front, surrounded by a circular brass plate with finger holes for dialing. The base is solid and likely made of a combination of metal and plastic, with small gold feet at each corner. The overall design is reminiscent of early 20th-century telephones, blending functionality with elaborate decorative elements.
description: A vintage-style corded telephone with a rotary dial, ornate brass and black accents, and a coiled cord connecting the handset to the base. The design is decorative and classic, evoking early 20th-century aesthetics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rotary dial, ornate cradle, and the handset resting on top with the coiled cord extending to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical earpiece and mouthpiece, with the cradle's decorative supports visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the base, the coiled cord trailing to the right, and the handset's rear profile.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the coiled cord and the back of the handset, with the cradle's ornate top visible.
